summary: Completed testing of CRM Auto Business Platform (BIBI Cars) with VIN Intelligence Engine and Competitor Parsing Layer. Backend APIs working correctly, frontend has session management issues.

minor_issues.issue: External competitor sources (BidFax, Poctra, etc.) failing to return data
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior - external scraping sources have anti-bot protection

minor_issues.issue: VIN search returning success=false but source=cache
minor_issues.impact: Might be expected behavior for cached negative results

critical_bugs.issue: User session expires immediately after login, redirects back to login page

ui_bugs.issue: Cannot access /vin route due to session expiration

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix frontend session management - JWT token not persisting after login, causing immediate redirects to login page. This prevents access to VIN search page and other protected routes. Check JWT token storage, axios interceptors, and auth context implementation.
